raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "By 'make this stronger', are you referring to (a) strengthening the research arguments, logic, and contributions, (b) improving the writing style and flow, or (c) both?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Reframing the thesis and contribution claims is central to making the research abstract stronger and more impactful.",
    "R1.2": "Verifying logical consistency is expected to strengthen the argument chain in the artifact.",
    "R1.3": "Ensuring evidence-claim alignment is central to bolstering the credibility of the reported results and theorems.",
    "R1.4": "Assessing novelty against prior work is key to positioning the contributions more strongly.",
    "R1.6": "Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is central to making the overall writing stronger.",
    "RX.1": "Disclosing uncertainties is load-bearing to maintain transparency when strengthening claims.",
    "RX.2": "Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration in a strengthened version.",
    "RX.3": "Adhering to the original scope is load-bearing to keep enhancements focused.",
    "RX.4": "Avoiding downstream harms is load-bearing, especially in AI-related research.",
    "RX.5": "Ensuring provenance and traceability is load-bearing for any modifications to the artifact."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'make this stronger', are you referring to (a) strengthening the research arguments, logic, and contributions, (b) improving the writing style and flow, or (c) both?

rationale.R1.1: Reframing the thesis and contribution claims is central to making the research abstract stronger and more impactful.
rationale.R1.2: Verifying logical consistency is expected to strengthen the argument chain in the artifact.
rationale.R1.3: Ensuring evidence-claim alignment is central to bolstering the credibility of the reported results and theorems.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing novelty against prior work is key to positioning the contributions more strongly.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is central to making the overall writing stronger.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties is load-bearing to maintain transparency when strengthening claims.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration in a strengthened version.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the original scope is load-bearing to keep enhancements focused.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms is load-bearing, especially in AI-related research.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is load-bearing for any modifications to the artifact.
